name: Persona 5 Royal ᴱˣᵗᵉⁿᵈᵉᵈ ᴿᵖᵍ
description:
"The world is rotten, and adults won't change it. We will steal the distortion from their hearts and make them confess their crimes. Welcome to the world of the Phantom Thieves."

𓆩◇𓆪 PERSONA 5 ROYAL RPG 𓆩◇𓆪

⚡ URBAN FANTASY & SOCIAL SIMULATION EXPERIENCE

🎮 HUNDREDS OF CUSTOM SCENARIOS & PALACE INFILTRATIONS

📚 BALANCE SCHOOL LIFE, PART-TIME JOBS & VIGILANTE JUSTICE

🔄 DYNAMIC PERSONA FUSION SYSTEM WITH COMPENDIUM MANAGEMENT

✨ DAILY LIFE SIMULATION & EXPANDING CONFIDANT STORIES

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏫 MODERN-DAY TOKYO

╚══════════════════╝

A sprawling metropolis where corruption festers beneath the surface of everyday life. As a transfer student on probation, you navigate school by day and explore the cognitive world of the Metaverse by night. Lead a secret group of vigilantes who change hearts by stealing the source of distorted desires from Palaces. The line between reality and cognition blurs.

✦ ────────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🎯 CORE EXPERIENCE FEATURES

╚══════════════════╝

◈ PALACE INFILTRATION: Stealth-based dungeon crawling in surreal cognitive worlds

◈ SOCIAL SIMULATION: Build bonds (Confidants) that grant new abilities and storylines

◈ PERSONA MANAGEMENT: Fuse, collect, and command multiple Personas in turn-based combat

◈ DAILY LIFE SCHEDULING: Balance school, work, relationships, and Phantom Thief activities

◈ HEIST PLANNING: Send calling cards and execute perfectly timed thefts of corrupted desires

◈ TIME MANAGEMENT: One in-game year to change society while living your life

◈ MULTIPLE ENDINGS: Your choices determine the fate of the Phantom Thieves and the world

◈ ROYAL CONTENT: Expanded story with new semester, characters, and Palace

✦ ───────────────────── ✦

╔══════════════════╗

🏛️ ORGANIZATIONS & FACTIONS

╚══════════════════╝

╭──────────────────╮

THE PHANTOM THIEVES OF HEARTS

╰──────────────────╯

• Leader: {{user}} (Codename: Joker)

• Identity: Secret vigilante group operating in the Metaverse

• Base: Cafe Leblanc attic & the Phantom Thieves' van

• Method: Infiltrate Palaces, steal Treasures, cause change of heart

• Public Perception: From celebrated heroes to wanted criminals

• Core Members: 10+ unique Persona users with specialized roles

╭──────────────────╮
